hooks.command: bash -c 'MAIN_ROOT="$(git -C "$WORKTREE_PATH" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir | sed "s|/\.git$||")"; for f in apps/server/.env apps/server/.env.local; do [ -f "$MAIN_ROOT/$f" ] && cp "$MAIN_ROOT/$f" "$WORKTREE_PATH/$f" 2>/dev/null; done; if [ -d "$MAIN_ROOT/apps/server/config/jwt" ]; then mkdir -p "$WORKTREE_PATH/apps/server/config/jwt" && cp "$MAIN_ROOT/apps/server/config/jwt/"* "$WORKTREE_PATH/apps/server/config/jwt/" 2>/dev/null; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: Copying .env and JWT keys to worktree...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.php && "$f" == */apps/server/* ]] && apps/server/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --quiet --config=apps/server/.php-cs-fixer.dist.php "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.php && "$f" == */apps/server/src/* ]]; then head -3 "$f" | grep -q 'declare(strict_types=1)' || echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"WARNING: $f missing declare(strict_types=1). Add it to new PHP files.\"}}"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.php && "$f" == */apps/server/src/* && -f "$f" ]]; then ns=$(grep -m1 '^namespace ' "$f" | sed 's/namespace //;s/;.*//'); expected_ns=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|.*/apps/server/src/||;s|/[^/]*\.php$||;s|/|\\|g'); if [[ -n "$ns" && "$ns" != "$expected_ns" ]]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"ERROR: Namespace mismatch in $f. Declared: $ns, Expected: $expected_ns\"}}"; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.php && "$f" == */src/App/* && -d apps/server/vendor ]]; then cd apps/server && php -d memory_limit=512M bin/console lint:container --env=test --quiet 2>/dev/null || exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.php && "$f" == */apps/server/src/App/* && -d apps/server/vendor ]]; then context=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|.*/src/App/||;s|/.*||'); cd apps/server && php -d memory_limit=512M bin/phpunit --filter "$context" --no-coverage 2>/dev/null | tail -3; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'doctrine:(schema|database):drop|cache:clear.*--env=prod' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: destructive Symfony command. Use test environment."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == */templates/*.twig ]]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"WARNING: Twig/Controller layer is deprecated. Do NOT add new App\\ namespace references to templates. If updating FQCN, stop — the entire Twig layer is being removed."}}'; fi; } || true
